About EKL

Find a Way or Make One.

EKL Consulting is a Dallas-based political strategy and government relations firm. We counsel candidates, campaigns, and governments that come to us with one requirement: they intend to win. Our work is built on execution, not opinion. Strategy without action is just conversation. We don’t have conversations. We deliver results.

About the Firm
50+Campaigns
300+Staff Directed

$2.5MRevenue Managed

Domestic Practice

Six Practice Areas

01

Field & Canvassing Operations

Voter targeting, door programs, staff recruitment, and GOTV execution from first knock to Election Night.

02

Candidate Coaching & Preparation

Message discipline, debate readiness, media training, and the pressure-testing that separates prepared candidates from everyone else.

03

Communications & Public Relations

Press strategy, rapid response, crisis management, and surrogate messaging that controls the narrative before someone else does.

04

Strategic Planning

30, 60, and 90-day campaign plans built around your race, your district, and your opponent. No templates. No recycled playbooks.

05

Fundraising Strategy

Donor universe development, call time accountability, major donor cultivation, and event strategy built around your finance goals.

06

Campaign Operations Audit

An honest assessment of where your campaign stands, benchmarked against races like yours, with a clear plan for what comes next.

View All Services

International Practice

Where the Work Takes Us.

EKL advises foreign governments, sovereign clients, and diaspora networks on US policy engagement, multilateral funding, and political communications. We bring access and fluency that most consulting firms cannot offer, and the discretion international clients require.

Where We Work
Texas Washington, D.C. Across the United States West Africa
Languages of Engagement English  ·  French
International Practice

Why EKL

What Sets Us Apart

We Execute, Not Advise

EKL doesn’t deliver recommendations and step back. We embed in the work, take ownership of outcomes, and stay until the job is finished.

Rare Fluency

Domestic campaign experience, international government relations, and genuine linguistic and cultural fluency across two continents. That combination is uncommon.

A Selective Practice

EKL limits its engagements to ensure every client gets full attention and full effort. We don’t take every race. We take the ones we believe we can win.

The Window Is Shorter Than You Think.

Most campaigns that lose were winnable. The difference is usually timing. EKL engagements are limited, and competitive cycles fill fast. If you’re serious about winning, reach out now.
